creator: brooks@one-eyed-alien.net
text:
On Wed, May 26, 2010 at 04:34:33AM +0000, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
 > On 05/26/10 04:27, Brooks Davis wrote:
 >> The problem is that this port does not actually depend on any libraries
 >> in devel/apr*.  It simply needs apr around so that configure runs
 >> without patching.  The actual port is just a bunch of php.  In practice
 >> a system which installs this port will have an installed copy of
 >> ganglia-monitor-core which does have a library dependency on apr so the
 >> dependency would he harmless, but wrong.
 > 
 > I think its better to have it as a LIB_DEPENDS anyway or patch ./configure 
 > (maybe I'll send a patch).
 > 
 > I'm prepping for USE_APR=0|1 et al in Mk/
 
 OK, that makes sense.  I'll make the switch eventually.
 
 -- Brooks
